rationale: Both papers are closely related in domain (grocery pricing dynamics with long weekly data), and the cited paper on pricing periodicity could plausibly be relevant to the citing study’s treatment of price changes during and after a price war. But the matched evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry with no in-text citation context, and the citing note does not explicitly identify this source as a key method/theory input. Given that sparse evidence, the safest triage is uncertain.
